conservative.name: Kindly Words
conservative.requirements: 4 favour. Target must be blessing to hear and understand you

success.description: You speak of the kindness of the goddess. If appropriate, you Influence the target and the target may not attack you until the end of the act or until you perform a hostile action towards the target or his allies (whichever comes first)
As above, and the target may not perform any hostile action whatsoever until the end of the act or until the target is attacked or is the target of a hostile action (whichever comes first)

boon.description: You and the target each recover 1 stress

bane.description: Move the party tension meter 1 space to the right

reckless.name: Kindly Words
reckless.requirements: 4 favour. Target must be able to hear and understand you

success.description: You speak of the kindness of the goddess. If appropriate, you Influence the target and the target may not attack you until the end of the act or until you perform a hostile action towards the target or his allies (whichever comes first)
As above, and you affect a number of additional targets equal to your character rank. These additional targets must have Willpower no higher than the first target

boon.description: You and the target(s) each recover 1 stress

bane.description: Move the party tension meter 1 space to the right
